headline: Ahead of PSEG (PEG) Q1 Earnings: Get Ready With Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for PSEG (PEG), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.
